preferred_name: Control and auxiliary circuits of transfer switching equipment

preferred_name_ml.en: Control and auxiliary circuits of transfer switching equipment
preferred_name_ml.fr: Circuits de commande et auxiliaire du matériel de connexion de transfert
preferred_name_ml.zh: 转换开关电器的控制和辅助电路

definition: all the conductive parts of the transfer switching equipment which are intended to be included in a circuit other than the main circuit

definition_ml.en: all the conductive parts of the transfer switching equipment which are intended to be included in a circuit other than the main circuit
definition_ml.fr: ensemble des pièces conductrices du matériel de connexion de transfert destinées à être insérées dans un circuit autre que le circuit principal
definition_ml.de: alle leitfähigen Teile des Netzumschalters, die dazu vorgesehen sind, in einen anderen Stromkreis als den Hauptstromkreis eingefügt zu werden
definition_ml.zh: 除主电路外，接入电路中用作转换开关电器的闭合操作和/或断开操作的开关电器所有导电部件。
